# INOSX

> Application development, technology solutions and AI solution development for production. INOSX builds custom applications, platforms, integrations, automation and AI systems that fit real business operations.

INOSX is a technology studio founded in 2021. We develop applications, technology solutions and AI solutions end-to-end for B2B clients across multiple continents: custom software, web and mobile apps, platforms, integrations, automation, AI systems and production operations. Our practice covers seven fronts: application development, platforms and integration, AI solution development and automation, security and trust (CyberAI), computer vision, product strategy, and proprietary products in operation.

The studio's commitment is "show, don't promise": real clients in production, real proprietary products in operation, real engagements documented as Selected Work. We use application development and technology solutions as the primary positioning; AI solution development, AI agents and automation remain explicit capabilities inside production systems.

## Pages

- [Home](https://inosx.com/): hero, disciplines, products, FAQ, lead form
- [Products](https://inosx.com/produtos.html): catalogue of proprietary products in production
- [Messiax](https://inosx.com/messiax.html): conversational support product
- [SurveyFlow](https://inosx.com/surveyflow.html): smart-survey product
- [ROI Calculator](https://inosx.com/roi-calculator.html): tool for prospects to estimate value
- [Terms](https://inosx.com/terms.html): terms of service and privacy

## Practices

- **Application development** — Custom web, mobile, desktop and internal apps shaped from research and UX through engineering and operation.
- **Technology and AI solutions** — Custom software, platforms, integration layers, automation and AI systems built for production.
- **Platforms and integration** — APIs, integrations, data pipelines, legacy modernization. Where existing software has to talk to new software.
- **AI solution development and automation** — High-return use-case discovery, knowledge platforms, orchestration, and production AI agents shipped with observability and cost control.
- **Security and trust (CyberAI)** — Continuous detection, response and audit across the product surface.
- **Computer vision** — Inspection, counting, quality control and visual automation in physical operations.
- **Product strategy** — Discovery, roadmap, design system. Decisions that survive the first user, the first audit and the next two years.

## Proprietary products in operation

- **Messiax** — Conversational support and follow-up on the customer's channel.
- **SurveyFlow** — Smart surveys with automated analysis and actionable insights.
- **PsychoX** — Digital psychometric assessments with AI-assisted clinical reports.
- **DataGPT** — Natural-language interface for talking to your data.
- **Ccoinx.ai** — Intelligence applied to finance and digital assets.
- **Tranquilopa** — AI-powered well-being and mental-health support.
- **AITEAM-X** — Full AI team on your machine, 30+ agents, shared memory, local data.

## Selected industries

Healthcare, education, financial services, manufacturing, retail, logistics, agribusiness, energy, public sector, technology, telecom, legal.

## Selected clients

Itaú, Santander, Telefônica, Volkswagen, Nissan, Thomson Reuters, Open Invention Network.

## How a project starts

A free diagnostic conversation. INOSX maps the client's context, objectives and data, and returns with a lean pilot proposal and a realistic timeline. Typical pilots reach production in 4 to 8 weeks. Architecture follows the client's operational reality, not the studio's preference: Node, Python, Go, Rust on the back end; React, Svelte, Vue on the front; managed cloud or on-prem.
